exploration_notes: Created `metrics_tracker.go` with a thread-safe `MetricsTracker` struct using `sync/atomic.Int64` for three counters (totalEvaluations, matchCount, errorCount). Added `metrics` field to `Server` struct in `server.go`, initialized in `New()`, and exposed via `GetMetrics()`. Integrated recording calls into all three public evaluation methods in `evaluation.go`: `Variant`, `Boolean`, and `Batch`.
